compatibility_profiles.name: legacy-wheel-architectures
compatibility_profiles.reason: cryptography 49 removed 32-bit Windows and Intel macOS wheels; 48.0.1 is the latest compatible wheel release and contains the preceding security fixes. This profile is not Windows XP evidence.

python_packages.name: pip
python_packages.purpose: Pinned installer front-end for release jobs.

python_packages.name: maturin
python_packages.purpose: Pinned PEP 517 backend for the Windows ARM64 cryptography source build.

python_packages.name: cffi
python_packages.purpose: Pinned cryptography build/runtime bridge for the Windows ARM64 source build and packaged vault.

python_packages.name: pycparser
python_packages.purpose: Pinned transitive cffi parser dependency used by release security builds.

python_packages.name: PyQt6
python_packages.purpose: Pinned desktop GUI dependency for native GUI bundles, including Windows x64 and ARM64 wheels.

python_packages.name: PyQt6-Qt6
python_packages.purpose: Pinned Qt runtime wheel used by PyQt6 native GUI bundles.

python_packages.name: cryptography
python_packages.purpose: Pinned modern vault encryption dependency. Windows x64 uses the upstream wheel; Windows ARM64 builds this version from source against the pinned ARM64 OpenSSL toolchain.

python_packages.name: truststore
python_packages.purpose: Pinned native certificate-store integration used by the security extra.

windows.name: openssl
windows.purpose: Architecture-correct OpenSSL used only for the cryptography 49 Windows ARM64 source build; weak cipher features remain disabled.

linux.name: appimagetool
linux.verification: Set APPIMAGETOOL to a preinstalled binary or set APPIMAGETOOL_SHA256 when APPIMAGETOOL_URL is downloaded.
